subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! At the hour when the frozen body and the malleable metal are rendered pliant through order and arrangement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله ساعت که جسم منجمد و فلز متطرقست بسبب نظم و ترتیبی
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @spiritual transformation, @the concourse on high
